name: stockbuddy-desktop
description: StockBuddy - 对话式 A 股投研助手 Electron 跨端桌面应用

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput & wait-on dist-electron/electron/main.js && electron .
scripts.build:icon: mkdir -p build/icon.iconset /tmp/stocksense-icon && qlmanage -t -s 1024 -o /tmp/stocksense-icon public/icons/icon.svg >/dev/null 2>&1 && ICON=/tmp/stocksense-icon/icon.svg.png && sips -z 16 16 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_16x16.png >/dev/null && sips -z 32 32 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_16x16@2x.png >/dev/null && sips -z 32 32 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_32x32.png >/dev/null && sips -z 64 64 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_32x32@2x.png >/dev/null && sips -z 128 128 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_128x128.png >/dev/null && sips -z 256 256 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_128x128@2x.png >/dev/null && sips -z 256 256 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_256x256.png >/dev/null && sips -z 512 512 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_256x256@2x.png >/dev/null && sips -z 512 512 $ICON --out build/icon.iconset/icon_512x512.png >/dev/null && cp $ICON build/icon.iconset/icon_512x512@2x.png && iconutil -c icns build/icon.iconset -o build/icon.icns
scripts.build: mkdir -p node_modules/.pnpm/better-sqlite3@12.11.1/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/node_gyp_bins && node scripts/write-build-info.cjs && pnpm run typecheck && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && cp electron/preload.cjs dist-electron/electron/preload.cjs
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:all: pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac dmg zip --x64 --arm64 --win nsis --x64

author: trigkit4
